title: Brachionidium pepe-portillae
taxonomy: Brachionidium pepe-portillae is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Brachionidium, which is a group of orchids native to Central and South America. The classification of Brachionidium pepe-portillae places it within the subtribe Maxillariinae, a subcategory of the orchid family. This species is further classified as a member of the tribe Cranichideae, which is a subcategory of the subtribe Maxillariinae. Brachionidium pepe-portillae's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other orchids within the same family and subfamily.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
